rationale.R1.6: The text reads as a carefully edited piece with consistent register and no loss of meaning. Sentences are concise and flow well.
rationale.RX.1: The output makes no claims about the certainty or uncertainty of the information presented.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the topics mentioned in the original text.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide any source information or justification for the changes made.
